title: My Dear Killer
overview: Following the mysterious decapitation of an insurance investigator, Police Inspector Peretti is put onto the case, but all the clues lead to an unsolved case of kidnapping and murder.

trailers.title: MY DEAR KILLER (1972) Trailer for this complex and entertaining giallo with George Hilton
